title: Octodisc
description: Adds 16 Splatoon themes music discs to your game
body:
Adds 16 music discs with Splatoon songs to your game. These discs are craftable using music discs and ink sacs, with 4 of them using glow ink sacs instead.

Songs

Off the Hook: Nasty Majesty, Shark Bytes, Fly Octo Fly. Dedf1sh & Off the hook: Spectrum Obligato, #47 Onward. Dedf1sh: Splattack (octo), #0 Shell, #1 Progress, #5 Thirsty, #6 Frisk, #9 Party, #13 Shade, #14 Crush. Squid Sisters: Calamari Inkantation. Callie: Bomb Rush Blush. Marie: Tide Goes Out.

Crafting

All discs except Calamari Inkantaion, #47 Onward, Fly Octo Fly, and Spectrum Obligato are crafted with one ink sac and one renewable (dropped by creepers when shot by skeleton) music disc. Calamari Inkantaion, #47 Onward, Fly Octo Fly, and Spectrum Obligato are crafted by combining non-renewable discs (otherside, pigstep, 5, and relic) with one glow ink sac.
